headline: The AI problem nobody is talking about
summary: The global race to build and deploy artificial intelligence is moving faster than most people realize. Nvidia has become one of the most valuable companies in the world, on the back of surging chip demand. Worldwide AI spending is projected to hit $2.5 trillion in 2026, according to Gartner. Wall ...

headline: The unexpected 92,000 drop in payrolls is a clue we might be reading the AI jobs narrative all wrong
summary: Is AI taking jobs? Or are companies cutting jobs to pay for the enormous capex outlays on AI?
